item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Bridget Bowman
Adam Edelman
Alexandra Marquez
item.description: The fight to shape the future of the Democratic Party is playing out in a slew of key primaries across six states Tuesday, as races across six states set the matchups in crucial November battlegrounds and settle personal and ideological battles across the country

media:content.media:text: A still taken from California governor's debate.
media:content.media:description: A still taken from California governor's debate.

item.title: Democratic battles and incumbents on defense: What to watch in Tuesday’s primaries

item.description: President Trump is expected to make an announcement about plans to drop the Justice Department's "anti-weaponization" fund. NBC News' Melanie Zanona has details on the backlash the fund has faced on Capitol Hill.

media:content.media:title: Trump to drop controversial 'anti-weaponization' fund
media:content.media:description: President Trump is expected to make an announcement about plans to drop the Justice Department's "anti-weaponization" fund. NBC News' Melanie Zanona has details on the backlash the fund has faced on Capitol Hill.

item.title: Trump to drop controversial 'anti-weaponization' fund

item.description: More than a dozen people were killed and hundreds more inured after an overnight barrage of Russian missiles and drones targeted the Ukrainian capital. Russia had previously warned that it intended “systematic strikes” on targets in Kyiv linked to Ukraine’s military, urging foreigners to leave.

media:content.media:title: Russia targets Kyiv with massive overnight attack
media:content.media:description: More than a dozen people were killed and hundreds more inured after an overnight barrage of Russian missiles and drones targeted the Ukrainian capital. Russia had previously warned that it intended “systematic strikes” on targets in Kyiv linked to Ukraine’s military, urging foreigners to leave.

item.title: Russia targets Kyiv with massive overnight attack

item.description: President Trump said he would be 'okay' if the Iranian regime refused to return to talks. The administration also appeared to abandon its $1.8 billion anti-weaponization fund. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

media:content.media:title: Trump speaks to NBC News amid Iran talks and administration's apparent abandonment of $1.8B fund
media:content.media:description: President Trump said he would be 'okay' if the Iranian regime refused to return to talks. The administration also appeared to abandon its $1.8 billion anti-weaponization fund. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

item.title: Trump speaks to NBC News amid Iran talks and administration's apparent abandonment of $1.8B fund

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley accused CBS News Editor-in-Chief Bari Weiss of “murdering” the venerable newsmagazine at a staff meeting with Nick Bilton, the technology journalist tapped to oversee the show, according to an audio recording and a source who was in the room.

media:content.media:credit: Getty Images for The Free Press; CBS News via Getty Images
media:content.media:text: Bari Weiss and Scott Pelley
media:content.media:description: Bari Weiss and Scott Pelley

item.title: Scott Pelley accuses CBS News’ Bari Weiss of ‘murdering’ ‘60 Minutes’

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Matt Freese once wrote a college research project on penalty kicks. Now he’s competing to be the starting goalie for the U.S. men’s national team at this summer’s World Cup.

media:content.media:text: United States v Paraguay - International Friendly
New York City FC v Nashville SC

item.title: Meet the Harvard grad and goalie who might lead the U.S. to World Cup glory

item.dc:creator: Evan Bush
item.description: Hurricane season in the Atlantic kicked off Monday, and for the first time in more than a decade, forecasters expect it to be slower than usual.

media:content.media:text: Hurricane Melissa makes landfall as Jamaica's strongest-ever storm
media:content.media:description: A satellite view of Hurricane Melissa over the Caribbean Sea, near New Hope, Jamaica, in October.

media:content.media:text: Hawaii Floods
media:content.media:description: A satellite view of Hurricane Melissa over the Caribbean Sea, near New Hope, Jamaica, in October.

item.title: Hurricane season begins, with the first below-average forecast in a decade

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: The Israeli military launched deadly new strikes in Lebanon on Tuesday after reporting attacks from Hezbollah overnight, despite President Donald Trump saying both sides had agreed to de-escalate after Iran threatened to pull out of peace talks

media:content.media:text: Israel Lebanon Iran War
media:content.media:description: Smoke rises following an Israeli Air Force bombardment in southern Lebanon as seen from northern Israel, Tuesday, June 2, 2026.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-LEBANON-ISRAEL-IRAN-US-WAR
media:content.media:description: A hospital damaged by an Israeli strike that hit nearby, in the southern Lebanese city of Tyre on Monday.

media:content.media:text: Lebanon Israel Iran War
media:content.media:description: Rescuers work at the site of an Israeli airstrike that hit a building and damaged a hospital in the southern port city of Tyre, Lebanon, on Monday.

item.title: Israel and Hezbollah trade new attacks despite Trump intervention

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Matt Freese once wrote a college research project on penalty kicks. Now he’s competing to be the starting goalie for the U.S. men’s national team at this summer’s World Cup.

media:content.media:text: United States v Paraguay - International Friendly
New York City FC v Nashville SC

item.title: Meet the Harvard grad and goalie who might lead the U.S. to World Cup glory

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
Madison Lambert
item.description: Authorities in Iowa are investigating the fatal shootings of six people who they believe were killed by a relative who took his own life when confronted by police Monday

media:content.media:text: The Muscatine Chief of Police said six people were found dead Monday afternoon and that the suspected gunman fatally shot himself.
media:content.media:description: Police were called Monday to a home in Muscatine, Iowa, where they found four people fatally shot.

item.title: Iowa gunman suspected of killing 6 family members then himself

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Bridget Bowman
Adam Edelman
Alexandra Marquez
item.description: The fight to shape the future of the Democratic Party is playing out in a slew of key primaries across six states Tuesday, as races across six states set the matchups in crucial November battlegrounds and settle personal and ideological battles across the country

media:content.media:text: A still taken from California governor's debate.

item.title: Democratic battles and incumbents on defense: What to watch in Tuesday’s primaries

item.dc:creator: Andrew Blankstein
Dennis Romero
item.description: A Los Angeles County court granted pop superstar Sabrina Carpenter a temporary restraining order Monday against a man she alleges has been stalking her and tried to get into her home.

media:content.media:text: Sabrina Carpenter
media:content.media:description: Sabrina Carpenter attends The 2026 Met Gala Celebrating "Costume Art" - Arrivals at Metropolitan Museum of Art on May 04, 2026 in New York.

item.title: Sabrina Carpenter granted restraining order against alleged stalker

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: Russian air attacks on major Ukrainian cities such as Kyiv, Dnipro and Kharkiv killed at least nine and wounded more than 60 early Tuesday, authorities said, after days of warnings that Moscow was planning a major assault.

media:content.media:text: UKRAINE-RUSSIA-CONFLICT-WAR
media:content.media:description: A firefighter works at the site of a Russian strike on Kyiv, Ukraine on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-UKRAINE-RUSSIA-CONFLICT-WAR
media:content.media:description: A firefighter works at the site of a Russian strike on Kyiv, Ukraine on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: People take shelter inside a metro station during a Russian air strike in Kyiv
media:content.media:description: A firefighter works at the site of a Russian strike on Kyiv, Ukraine on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: APTOPIX Russia Ukraine War
media:content.media:description: A firefighter works at the site of a Russian strike on Kyiv, Ukraine on Tuesday.

item.title: Major Russian attack kills at least 16 and leaves Ukraine pleading for help from Trump

item.dc:creator: Jon Schuppe
item.description: New Mexico lawmakers said they are demanding documents from an array of government and private institutions as the first major step in their effort to tell the full story of what Jeffrey Epstein did in the state.

media:content.media:text: The mansion of Zorro Ranch in Stanley, NM.
media:content.media:description: The mansion of Zorro Ranch in Stanley, N.M.

item.title: New Mexico lawmakers to blast out subpoenas in Epstein investigation

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Raquel Coronell Uribe
Frank Thorp V
item.description: Other progressive members of Congress who endorsed Platner, the leading Democratic candidate for the Senate in Maine, are also coming to his defense.

media:content.media:text: Maine Democratic Candidate For Senate Graham Platner Campaigns Across The State
media:content.media:description: Sen. Bernie Sanders, I-Vermont, and Democratic U.S. Senate candidate Graham Platner stand together during a “Fighting Oligarchy” tour stop at the Collins Center for the Arts on the University of Maine campus on May 24, 2026 in Orono, Maine.

item.title: Bernie Sanders defends Graham Platner after reports of sexually explicit text messages

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley accused CBS News Editor-in-Chief Bari Weiss of “murdering” the venerable newsmagazine at a staff meeting with Nick Bilton, the technology journalist tapped to oversee the show, according to an audio recording and a source who was in the room.

media:content.media:credit: Getty Images for The Free Press; CBS News via Getty Images

item.title: Scott Pelley accuses CBS News’ Bari Weiss of ‘murdering’ ‘60 Minutes’

item.dc:creator: Erika Edwards
Maggie Vespa
item.description: Five of the 18 U.S. cruise ship passengers quarantined in Nebraska went home Monday, halfway through their quarantine after being exposed to hantavirus, the CDC said.

media:content.media:text: Nebraska Medicine's Davis Global Center in Omaha, Neb. where American passengers from the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship will quarantine.
media:content.media:description: American passengers from the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship have been quarantining at Nebraska Medicine's Davis Global Center in Omaha.

media:content.media:text: Jake Rosmarin shows off his quarantine room.
media:content.media:description: American passengers from the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship have been quarantining at Nebraska Medicine's Davis Global Center in Omaha.

item.title: State trooper guards and daily fever checks: Some hantavirus cruise passengers go home

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
item.description: Pregnant women, parents of young children, veterans with disabilities and several other groups will be exempt from Medicaid’s new work requirements, the Trump administration said Monday

media:content.media:credit: Astrid Riecken For The Washington Post via Getty Images file
media:content.media:text: People protest the upcoming Medicaid cuts
media:content.media:description: People protest Medicaid cuts in Washington, D.C., in May 2025.

item.title: Trump admin outlines who would be exempt from Medicaid work requirements

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
item.description: A teenage competitor is accused of injuring three horses with a knife at a barn near a Las Vegas competition over the weekend, police and horse show organizers said

media:content.media:text: Bay Horse Running in Barrel Race
media:content.media:description: Brown horse running barrel race.

item.title: Teen horse competitor accused of hurting animals during Las Vegas event

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: In today’s edition, Allan Smith and Natasha Korecki explore how Democrats are trying to turn the GOP’s “drain the swamp” message on its head.

media:content.media:text: Pennsylvania Residents Vote In Primary Election
media:content.media:description: Josh Shapiro, governor of Pennsylvania, during an election night event at The Fuge in Warminster Township, Pennsylvania, on May 19, 2026.

item.title: Democrats zero in on an anti-corruption message: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
Cory Fernandez
Bethany Heitman
item.description: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

item.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer
